subcodes.first_line: O Moses! Hearken unto My call, then soar in the atmosphere of the spirit and grieve not over aught. Then aid thou the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کلیم اسمع ندائی ثم طیر فی هواء الروح و لاتحزن فی شیء ثم انصر الامر
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
